steps.caption: Regime Forfettario is a simplified tax system in Italy designed for small businesses with low revenues. This guide shows how to activate it.
After logging into the Backoffice, under Articles click on Products.
You are now in the products overview.
Select a product you wish to change by clicking the pencil icon next to it.
In the product form, open the VAT section under Prices.
Open the VAT drop-down and select the option 0% - Zero.
After changing all the products you need, remember to click Save.
Click on General in the left menu.
Open the establishment settings. In the main menu go to General, then open your store/establishment.
Click the pencil icon to modify the details of your selected establishment.
In the establishment settings, locate the Regime Forfettario checkbox in the top right corner and select it. (This option appears only for Italian establishments.)
A warning message will appear - read and make sure you understand its content before continuing.
If you ever decide to deactivate the Regime Forfettario, simply de-select the checkbox.
A new warning message will appear, informing you of what the action means.
After making this change, click on Save.
Click on Send to transmit the provisioning so the changes are not lost.
That's it. You now know how to activate the Regime Forfettario.
